story.goal: Determine the suspect, weapon, and location of the murder.

evidence_data.title: Tool Pegboard
evidence_data.description: The tool pegboard is meticulously organized with labeled hooks. One hook labeled 'WRENCH - 14"' is empty. No dust outline, so it was removed recently.

evidence_data.title: Wrench on Ground
evidence_data.description: A 14-inch wrench lies on the concrete floor near Morgan's body. It's wet and appears to have been rinsed clean.

evidence_data.title: Morgan's Body
evidence_data.description: Morgan's body lies near the edge of the tidal pool. There's blunt force trauma to the back of his head, seeping blood. His skin is pruned from prolonged exposure to the humid, misty environment, suggesting he's been here for many hours.

evidence_data.title: Fishing Wire
evidence_data.description: A coil of thin, ultra-strong fishing wire sits on a shelf. The wire is taut and sharp enough to cut skin if pulled tight.

evidence_data.title: Letter Opener
evidence_data.description: A sharp letter opener sits on the desk. The blade is long and pointed, with a weighted brass handle.

evidence_data.title: Chemical Vial
evidence_data.description: A research chemical vial sits on the work bench, half empty. The label warns: 'TOXIC - Fatal if ingested in high concentrations.'

evidence_data.title: Research Station Log
evidence_data.description: The research station log shows Morgan's last entry, timestamped yesterday at 9:45 PM: 'Heading down to tidal pool lab at 10:00 PM for late night contamination sampling. Need to collect data during high tide.'

evidence_data.title: Muddy Boot Prints and Wet Rope
evidence_data.description: Large boot prints track across the floor, the mixture of wet mud and coarse sand thick and caked on. Next to them sits a coil of heavy marine rope, soaking wet and covered in fresh seaweed.

evidence_data.title: Timed Chemical Test
evidence_data.description: A row of test tubes sits in a rack, each labeled in thirty-minute intervals from 9:00 PM through midnight. Each tube contains a sample at different stages of a color-changing reaction.

evidence_data.title: Beacon Room Security Log
evidence_data.description: A security tablet by the door shows Riley entering at 7:09 PM, James entering at 12:14 AM, James leaving at 3:07 AM, and Riley leaving at 7:51 AM.

evidence_data.title: Yuki's Damp Jacket
evidence_data.description: A professional jacket is draped over a chair. The sleeves and lower hem are noticeably wet and carry a faint chemical smell from the treated tidal pool water.

responses.text: Yeah, that's all mine. I was outside most of the night securing my boat down on the dock. Had to use that spare anchor line when my primary started fraying in the wind.
